name.description: OPTIONAL operator-supplied display label (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.7). The server mints the opaque group_id; the caller never supplies it. Reserved group names (`admins`, `orchestrators`) are rejected.

items.description: Member id — a worker_id (wkr_*) or a group_id (grp_*) (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).
